title: Render performance improvements (upstream 32942d97)

source.notes: Upstream commit Mar 13 2026. Multiple render perf improvements across 7 files.

description: Bundle of render performance fixes: remove unused atom subscriptions causing unnecessary re-renders, defer FenSearch API calls until the user actually types, memoize tree stats computation, wrap root comment in styled Box, and migrate from useContext to React 19 use() for better re-render boundaries. Also disables immer autoFreeze for performance in production.
notes: 7 source files changed (plus package.json/lockfile for proxy-memoize dep)
React 19 use() replaces useContext in FenSearch.tsx, InfoPanel.tsx — use() integrates with Suspense/transitions
proxy-memoize is a NEW dependency — needs adding to package.json
immer setAutoFreeze(false) prevents deep-freezing large tree state objects
VERIFIED: none of these changes exist in our fork yet

in_scope: Change 1: DetachedEval.tsx — remove unused engineProgressFamily atom subscription
Change 2: GameNotation.tsx — wrap root comment in Box with padding/font-size
Change 3: FenSearch.tsx — (a) useContext→use(), (b) make currentFen prop optional with internal fallback, (c) add hasTyped gate to defer SWR API call until user types
Change 4: InfoPanel.tsx — (a) useContext→use() in both components, (b) replace inline useMemo(getTreeStats) with useStore(store, getStats) selector, (c) remove currentNode/FenSearch currentFen prop
Change 5: RepertoireInfo.tsx — replace useMemo(getTreeStats) with useStore(store, getStats)
Change 6: index.tsx — import and call setAutoFreeze(false) from immer
Change 7: repertoire.ts — make getTreeStats private, add memoized getStats export using proxy-memoize
out_of_scope: Other performance work not in this commit
React Compiler changes (already done in separate cherry-pick)

requirements: FenSearch still shows opening names when user types a FEN
FenSearch no longer fires API calls on every board position change (only when user types)
DetachedEval still displays correctly (removing unused atom shouldn't change anything)
Root comment in notation panel has proper padding/spacing
Tree stats in InfoPanel and RepertoireInfo still display correctly
No immer freeze errors in console
edge_cases: FenSearch with no currentFen prop — should use internal store fen
Rapid move navigation — should not trigger opening name lookups
Large game tree (100+ nodes) — tree stats should not recompute on every render

requirements: Reduced re-renders during move navigation (measurable in React DevTools Profiler)
No SWR API calls during board navigation (only on user FEN input)

acceptance_gates: pnpm tauri dev launches without errors
No console errors during normal game navigation
FenSearch works when user types but doesn't fire on navigation

manual: Open a game, navigate forward/backward with arrow keys — should feel smooth, no lag
Open browser console (Inspect > Network tab) — verify no search_opening_name API calls during navigation
Click into FenSearch input and type a FEN — API call should fire and show opening name
Check Info panel shows tree stats (total moves, depth, leafs)
Open a game with a root comment — verify it displays with proper padding
Open Repertoire practice — verify stats display correctly

done_criteria: FenSearch only fires API on user input
